response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was reviewed in its entirety. 2. No instances of singing or vocal musical performances were detected; the audio consisted solely of spoken Japanese conversation and instrumental background music. 3. Consequently, no lyrics were searched for or included.
response.global_summary: This video is a segment of a talk show hosted by the VTuber Ookami Mio. Throughout the video, she is engaged in conversational talking, reading and responding to viewer-submitted comments and pictures of food. No singing or vocal music performance occurs in this segment; the background audio is purely instrumental.

scenes.description: Ookami Mio discusses viewer-submitted photos of cold noodles (Reimen).
Ookami Mio discusses viewer-submitted photos of tacos.
Ookami Mio discusses viewer-submitted photos of edamame.
Ookami Mio discusses viewer-submitted photos of shaved ice.
